title: useTrigger
description: Provides a boolean state toggle with utility methods like on, off, and toggle.
summary: Simple boolean state controller with toggling helpers.

`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-trigger",code:`"use client";\r
import { DependencyList, useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
import { useMeasureScrollbar } from "@/hooks/use-measure-scrollbar";\r
\r
interface UseTrigger {\r
  popstate?: boolean;\r
  modal?: boolean;\r
  open?: boolean;\r
  setOpen?: (v: boolean) => void;\r
  defaultOpen?: boolean;\r
  delay?: number;\r
}\r
\r
export function useTrigger<T extends HTMLElement | null>(handle: UseTrigger = {}) {\r
  const { modal, popstate = false, open: exOpen, setOpen: exSetOpen, defaultOpen = false, delay = 115 } = handle;\r
  const [inOpen, inSetOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);\r
  const open = exOpen !== undefined ? exOpen : inOpen;\r
  const setOpen = exSetOpen !== undefined ? exSetOpen : inSetOpen;\r
  const [initialOpen, setInitialOpen] = useState(false);\r
  const ref = useRef<T>(null);\r
\r
  const render = useRender(open, { delay, modal });\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    if (open !== defaultOpen) {\r
      setInitialOpen(true);\r
    }\r
  }, [open, defaultOpen]);\r
\r
  const toggle = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (popstate) {\r
      if (!open) {\r
        window.history.pushState({ open: true }, "");\r
        setOpen(true);\r
      } else {\r
        window.history.back();\r
        setOpen(false);\r
      }\r
    } else {\r
      setOpen(!open);\r
    }\r
  }, [popstate, open, setOpen]);\r
\r
  usePopState(popstate, { open, setOpen });\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const current = ref.current;\r
\r
    const attachListeners = (el: T | null) => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        el.addEventListener("click", toggle);\r
      }\r
    };\r
    const detachListeners = (el: T | null) => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        el.removeEventListener("click", toggle);\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    attachListeners(current);\r
    return () => {\r
      detachListeners(current);\r
    };\r
  }, [ref, toggle]);\r
\r
  return { ref, open, setOpen, initialOpen, render, toggle };\r
}\r
\r
export function useRender(open: boolean, { delay = 150, modal = false } = {}, depend?: DependencyList) {\r
  const [render, setRender] = useState(open);\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    let timeoutId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r
    if (open) {\r
      setRender(true);\r
    } else {\r
      timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {\r
        setRender(false);\r
      }, delay);\r
    }\r
    return () => {\r
      if (timeoutId) {\r
        clearTimeout(timeoutId);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [open, delay, depend]);\r
\r
  useMeasureScrollbar(!open ? render : open, { modal });\r
\r
  return render;\r
}\r
\r
function usePopState(popstate?: boolean, { open, setOpen }: { open?: boolean; setOpen?: (v: boolean) => void } = {}) {\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const historyPopState = () => {\r
      if (open && setOpen) {\r
        setOpen(false);\r
      }\r
    };\r
    if (popstate) {\r
      window.addEventListener("popstate", historyPopState);\r
    }\r
    return () => {\r
      if (popstate) {\r
        window.removeEventListener("popstate", historyPopState);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [popstate, open, setOpen]);\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-trigger.ts"})]})}function u(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(c,{...n})}):c(n)}function d(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return v(y);})();
